prompt_text: Sinister Electro house, Progressive house, Electronic dance music, House, Electronic, Tech house, Trip hop, Energetic, Dark, Repetitive, Sinister, Instrumental, Nocturnal, Eclectic, Rhythmic, Lush, Futuristic, Mechanical. evoke a sense of malevolence and intensity, with a fast tempo around 130-140 BPM. Incorporate ominous, dark synth melodies and aggressive, driving beats. The bassline should be powerful and foreboding, enhancing the dark and intense atmosphere. Smooth yet unsettling transitions should be used to maintain a consistent, sinister tone throughout the track. The music should reflect the theme of an AI that controls an human, the AI is arrogant, and psychopathic, descending into evil. Aim to create a soundscape that feels both futuristic and menacing, capturing the essence of a malevolent electronic entity.
prompt_zh: 阴森的 Electro house、Progressive house、Electronic dance music、House、Electronic、Tech house、Trip hop、充满活力的、黑暗的、重复的、阴森的、纯器乐、夜曲风格的、多元的、节奏感强的、丰富的、未来的、机械的。营造一种邪恶和紧张的感觉，节奏约为 130-140 BPM。融入不祥的黑暗合成器旋律和激烈的、推动性的节拍。低音线应强劲且令人不安，增强黑暗和紧张的氛围。使用平滑但令人不安的过渡，以保持整首曲子一致的阴森基调。音乐应反映一个控制人类的 AI，这个 AI 高傲且心理变态，逐渐堕入邪恶。力求创造一个既未来感又威胁感的音景，捕捉邪恶电子实体的本质。
title: AI Morning Routine

title: Synth Waves

prompt_text: “Caminata del Cocodrilo” is an engaging 120 BPM Amapiano track that features the signature log-drum bassline, steady 4-4 beat, and intricate percussive rhythms. The deep and rhythmic log-drum provides a compelling foundation, while the soft and airy piano melodies add a touch of elegance. The Latin percussion, including congas, bongos, and shakers, creates a lively and textured rhythm. Ethereal synths and atmospheric pads enhance the track’s depth and richness. Subtle electronic effects and creative sound design elements introduce unexpected surprises, keeping the listener engaged. The female vocal tells a symbolic story in Spanish about a crocodile’s journey, adding an emotional and rhythmic layer to the track.
prompt_zh: “Caminata del Cocodrilo” 是一首引人入胜的 120 BPM Amapiano 作品，具有标志性的 log-drum 贝斯线、稳定的 4-4 节拍和复杂的打击乐节奏。深沉而有节奏的 log-drum 为曲子提供了引人注目的基础，而轻柔飘逸的钢琴旋律则增添了一丝优雅。拉丁打击乐，包括 congas、bongos 和 shakers，营造出活泼而丰富的节奏。空灵的合成器和氛围垫增强了曲子的深度和丰富性。微妙的电子效果和创意声音设计元素引入了意想不到的惊喜，保持了听众的参与感。女声用西班牙语讲述了一则关于鳄鱼旅程的象征性故事，为曲子增添了情感和节奏的层次。
title: Quetzal’s Flight

prompt_text: A melancholic, yet driving, electronic track featuring a soaring operatic vocal melody layered over an intricate, polyrhythmic beat.  The track utilizes layered synth pads, deep basslines, and pulsing arpeggios with reverberant effects, evoking a sense of epic grandeur and historical nostalgia.
prompt_zh: 一首悲壮而激昂的电子乐 (electronic) 作品，包含高亢的歌剧式 (operatic) 人声旋律，叠加在复杂多节奏 (polyrhythmic) 的节拍之上。曲目使用了分层的合成器垫音 (synth pads)、深沉的贝斯线条 (deep basslines) 和带有混响效果 (reverberant effects) 的脉动琶音 (pulsing arpeggios)，营造出一种宏大的史诗感和历史怀旧情绪。
title: Echoes of Yesterday

prompt_text: Create a drum and bass track that blends the haunting allure of ethereal vocals with the gritty, urban feel of boom-bap drums. Start with a deep, resonant bassline that sets a dark, compelling undertone. Layer crisp, punchy drum patterns that embody the classic boom-bap style — think sharp snares and deep kick drums that resonate with each beat. downtempo, deep house,
prompt_zh: 创作一首鼓与贝斯 (Drum and Bass) 曲目，将空灵人声的神秘魅力与Boom-Bap鼓的粗犷城市感融为一体。以深沉、共鸣的贝斯线开始，营造出一种黑暗而引人入胜的基调。叠加清脆、有力的鼓点模式，体现经典的Boom-Bap风格——想象一下尖锐的军鼓和深沉的底鼓，每一下都与节拍共鸣。[Downtempo, Deep House]
title: I wish <cover> ._ [Anagnorisis]\[UDIO] _.@

prompt_zh: 一首有机的部落深屋 (Tribal Deep House) 曲目，包含旋律合成器 (melodic synth)、打击乐 (percussion)、滤波牛铃 (filtered cowbell)、铁琴 (glockenspiel)、军鼓 (hi hats)、Moog Sub 37 低音合成器 (bongos) 和滤波踢鼓 (filtered kick drum)。和谐的男性烟嗓 (harmonic male smokey voice)，略带不和谐音 (slightly dissonant) 和八度变化 (octave shift)，融合 (fusion) 和滤波浩室风风琴 (filtered house organ)。
